title: Changing the Colour of Column Name Text
excerpt:

posts.author: Alastair_Foggo (Alastair Foggo)
posts.cookedHtml:
A really useful feature for me would be to have the functionality to change the text colour of the column names on boards at item level and sub item level.
Currently some boards have many columns and this would be a simple way to group them visually. Appreciate there is the option to create a view but this can result in many views which then ‘clog up’ the menu area.
